160 g/m² , 100% Polyester High Visible, Chemical Resistant,1/1 Plain Woven Fabric

100% Polyester high visible, water repellent oxford fabric. Arox T2 WR fabrics are used for outdoor jackets, trousers and bodywarmers. Certified for EN ISO 20471.
